basic_details.job_title: Kerala Cashew Board Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Manager and Business Development Executive Posts
basic_details.post_name: Manager (Procurement & Marketing) and Business Development Executive (BDE)
basic_details.short_information: Kerala Cashew Board has released the official Manager (Procurement & Marketing) and Business Development Executive (BDE) Recruitment 2026 Notification. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the Kerala Cashew Board Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with qualifications such as MBA (Marketing)/MBA Agri Business Management or equivalent Post Graduation Degree for Manager post and Graduation in B.Com/BBA/BBM with good IT knowledge for BDE post can apply online. Candidates must meet the prescribed age limit of below 40 years for Manager and below 30 years for BDE. The last date to sub

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Below 40 years for Manager, Below 30 years for BDE
age_limit.details: Manager (Procurement & Marketing): Maximum age 40 years. Business Development Executive (BDE): Maximum age 30 years.

qualification.education_qualification: MBA (Marketing)/MBA Agri Business Management or equivalent Post Graduation Degree for Manager, Graduation in B.com/BBA/BBM with good IT knowledge for BDE.
qualification.details: Manager (Procurement & Marketing) Qualifications: MBA (Marketing)/MBA Agri Business Management or any equivalent Post Graduation Degree from a reputed and recognized University Experience: Minimum 5 years Post qualification experience in procurement. Experience in marketing is desirable. Business Development Executive (BDE) Qualifications: Graduation in B.com/BBA/BBM from a reputed and recognized University with good IT knowledge Experience: 3 to 4 Years of experience in the field of general administration/ Government e-file maintaining system and IT domains (MS Office, Social media management and AI Tools)

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 45,000/- per month for Manager, Rs. 25,000/- per month for BDE.

selection_process: Scrutiny of applications Interview of shortlisted candidates Additional selection process (if required)
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Kerala Cashew Board Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Kerala Cashew Board to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Kerala Cashew Board Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Kerala Cashew Board Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Kerala Cashew Board Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Manager (Procurement & Marketing) Qualifications: MBA (Marketing)/MBA Agri Business Management or any equivalent Post Graduation Degree from a reputed and recognized University Experience: Minimum 5 years Post qualification experience in procurement. Experience in marketing is desirable. Business Development Executive (BDE) Qualifications: Graduation in B.com/BBA/BBM from a reputed and recognized University with good IT knowledge Experience: 3 to 4 Years of experience in the field of general administration/ Government e-file maintaining system and IT domains (MS Office, Social media management and AI Tools)

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Manager (Procurement & Marketing): Maximum age 40 years. Business Development Executive (BDE): Maximum age 30 years.

rows.event: Last date for submitting the online application

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Scrutiny of applications Interview of shortlisted candidates Additional selection process (if required)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Kerala Cashew Board Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Kerala Cashew Board to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Kerala Cashew Board Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What are the posts available in Kerala Cashew Board Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The available posts are Manager (Procurement & Marketing) and Business Development Executive (BDE). There are a total of 2 vacancies for these positions.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for Kerala Cashew Board Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the online application for the Kerala Cashew Board Recruitment 2026 is 17 July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for these posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Manager and BDE posts at Kerala Cashew Board is strictly online. Candidates must fill out the prescribed application form on the official website.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the Manager (Procurement & Marketing) post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Manager (Procurement & Marketing) post is Rs. 45,000/- per month. This is a contract-based position with a competitive remuneration package.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Business Development Executive (BDE) post?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Business Development Executive (BDE) post must be below 30 years of age. Age relaxation details, if any, should be checked in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for the Manager post?
faq.answer: For the Manager (Procurement & Marketing) post, candidates need an MBA (Marketing) or MBA Agri Business Management or any equivalent Post Graduation Degree from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for Kerala Cashew Board Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for the Kerala Cashew Board Recruitment 2026. Candidates should confirm this detail from the official PDF.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves scrutiny of applications, followed by an interview for shortlisted candidates. Additional selection processes may be conducted if deemed necessary by the board.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article. It contains comprehensive details about the recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website to apply?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online by visiting the official website of the Centre for Management Development (CMD), Thiruvananthapuram, which is www.cmd.kerala.gov.in. The application link will be active during the application period.
